NAVAREA XIX 152/18

ANDOEYA NORWAY
ONE SCIENTIFIC ROCKET WILL BE LAUNCHED FROM ANDOEYA SPACE CENTER ON ANDOEYA IN THE PERIOD FROM JANUARY 2ND TO JANUARY 17TH 2019. 
THE LAUNCH WILL BE CONDUCTED BETWEEN 0700-1200 UTC, IN THE ANNOUNCED PERIOD. 
MARITIME TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING HAZARD AREAS:
 
AREA 1: AN AREA DEFINED BY THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES
1. 69-44.00N - 016-10.00E 
2. 69-23.00N - 016-08.00E 
3. 69-18.00N - 016-04.00E 
4. 69-18.00N - 015-58.00E 
5. 69-23.00N - 015-53.00E 
6. 69-44.00N - 015-50.00E 
7. 69-44.00N - 016-10.00E 

AREA 2: AN AREA DEFINED BY THE FOLLOWING COORDINATES
1. 74-18.00N - 016-00.00E 
2. 74-12.00N - 016-54.00E 
3. 73-57.00N - 017-14.00E 
4. 73-42.00N - 016-53.00E 
5. 73-37.00N - 016-10.00E 
6. 73-41.00N - 015-22.00E 
7. 73-57.00N - 015-00.00E 
8. 74-10.00N - 015-16.00E 
9. 74-18.00N - 016-00.00E 

SEE WWW.ANDOYASPACE.NO FOR DAILY UPDATES AND MAPS. NAVAREA XIX 152/18
